channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Global geopolitical news headlines curated from Tier 1 and Tier 2 sources

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia sidelines Lavrov from Ukraine peace talks
item.description: Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov has been cut out of Moscow's Ukraine negotiations, with officials saying he has 'no say' in peace talks. Other Kremlin figures like Yuri Ushakov now drive Russia's outreach to Washington.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK quietly issues waivers for Russian oil imports
item.description: The UK issued licenses allowing imports of diesel and jet fuel made from Russian oil if processed in third countries, plus a separate license for maritime transport of Russian LNG. The waivers come amid rising fuel costs from the Iran conflict.

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden to buy four frigates from France
item.description: Sweden announced it will purchase four new frigates from France's Naval Group as part of its NATO rearmament push. The deal follows Sweden's 2024 accession to the alliance and reflects Europe's broader defense buildup.

item.title: 🇨🇳 Chinese carrier Liaoning begins western Pacific drills
item.description: China's Liaoning aircraft carrier group launched live-fire exercises in the western Pacific, months after a stand-off with Japanese fighter jets during December training. The drills come amid tense Beijing-Tokyo relations.

item.title: ⚔️ MQ-25A Stingray cleared for deployment
item.description: The US Navy's first carrier-based unmanned aircraft reached milestone C, moving into production and deployment. The Boeing Stingray will relieve F/A-18 Super Hornets from aerial refueling duties, extending carrier strike group reach.

item.title: 🌍 Fast-spreading Ebola outbreak in Central Africa
item.description: A rapidly growing Ebola outbreak in Central Africa has killed at least 131 people, with health officials warning of limited containment capacity in the conflict-affected region.

item.title: 🌍 Europe's secret Plan B to replace NATO
item.description: European leaders are quietly developing contingency plans for a post-NATO security framework amid concerns about US commitment to the alliance under Trump.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Trump says US may need to hit Iran again
item.description: President Trump warned that the United States may need to strike Iran again, while saying there was a "very good chance" of reaching a peace deal with Tehran.

item.title: ⚔️ Russia warns Latvia on Ukraine drone launches
item.description: Russia's UN ambassador said Moscow had information Ukraine planned to launch military drones from Baltic states, warning NATO membership would not protect them from retaliation.

item.title: 💰 G7 finance ministers explore Iran war fallout responses
item.description: Finance ministers from G7 nations are coordinating responses to economic fallout from the Iran conflict, including energy market disruptions and sanctions enforcement.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israel's Smotrich under ICC scrutiny over West Bank
item.description: The International Criminal Court is examining Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich's role in West Bank settlement expansion, adding to pressure on Israeli officials.

item.title: 🇪🇺 NATO commander downplays US troop withdrawal talk
item.description: NATO's top military commander sought to reassure European allies about US commitment to the alliance, downplaying concerns about potential American troop reductions.

item.title: 🇨🇺 Cuba warns of bloodbath if US attacks
item.description: Cuba issued a stark warning about potential violence if the United States takes military action, as Washington adds new sanctions to the island nation.

item.title: 🌍 DR Congo Ebola death toll rises to 131
item.description: The estimated death toll from the Ebola outbreak in Democratic Republic of Congo has risen sharply to at least 131, as health officials struggle to contain the spread.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Paxton earns Trump endorsement in Texas Senate race
item.description: President Trump endorsed Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton in the GOP primary for U.S. Senate, boosting his challenge to incumbent Senator John Cornyn.

item.title: 🇨🇦 Canada's April inflation surges to 2.8% on Iran war
item.description: Canadian inflation accelerated to 2.8% in April as gasoline costs spiked due to the Iran conflict, putting pressure on households and policymakers.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Explosions heard on Iran's Qeshm Island
item.description: Explosions were reported on Iran's Qeshm Island, with Iranian officials attributing them to disposal of enemy ammunition amid heightened regional tensions.

item.title: 🛢️ Four US LNG vessels sailing to China after Trump-Xi summit
item.description: Four US liquefied natural gas vessels are en route to China following the Trump-Xi summit, signaling a potential thaw in energy trade between the two nations.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan's economy grew more than expected in Q1
item.description: Japan's economy expanded more than anticipated in the first quarter, providing a boost as the country navigates global trade uncertainties.

item.title: 🇮🇷 UAE says drone near nuclear plant launched from Iraq
item.description: The United Arab Emirates said a drone that struck near its nuclear facility was launched from Iraq, raising concerns about regional escalation.

item.title: ⚔️ Russians covertly trained by China return to fight in Ukraine
item.description: Around 200 Russian troops who underwent training at military facilities in Beijing have returned to fight in Ukraine, according to sources familiar with the matter.

item.title: 🇪🇪 NATO jet shoots down Ukrainian drone over Estonia
item.description: A NATO fighter jet shot down a Ukrainian drone that entered Estonian airspace, with Kyiv blaming Russia for steering the drone off course.

item.title: 🇹🇼 Taiwan cautiously optimistic on US arms sales
item.description: Taiwan's defense minister expressed cautious optimism about future US arms sales as the island continues to build its defensive capabilities against China.

item.title: ⚔️ Pentagon inks $500M counter-drone deal
item.description: The Pentagon signed a $500 million deal with Perennial Autonomy for advanced counter-drone technology, highlighting the growing threat posed by unmanned aerial systems.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian attack damages 25 homes in Kharkiv
item.description: Russian overnight strikes damaged 25 homes in Kharkiv and hit port facilities in Izmail, continuing Moscow's campaign against Ukrainian infrastructure.
